<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="pt-BR">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Di · Relatório Executivo — ImobCore v2</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&family=Syne:wght@700;800&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<script src="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/Chart.js/4.4.1/chart.umd.js"></script>
<style>
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
   DI · GERADOR DE RELATÓRIO EXECUTIVO — IMOBCORE v2
   Módulo Replit — Claude API powered
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}
:root{
  --bg:#05070e;--surface:#090c18;--panel:#0c1020;--card:#101428;
  --border:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);--border2:rgba(255,255,255,0.13);
  --violet:#7c3aed;--lav:#a78bfa;--cyan:#06b6d4;--green:#10b981;
  --emerald:#34d399;--amber:#f59e0b;--red:#ef4444;--teal:#0ea5e9;
  --text:#f0f4ff;--muted:#4a5578;--dim:#1c2240;
}
html,body{min-height:100vh;background:var(--bg);color:var(--text);font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;}

/* ── AMBIENT ── */
.bg-scene{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;overflow:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
.orb{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;filter:blur(120px);}
.o1{width:700px;height:700px;background:rgba(109,40,217,.07);top:-250px;left:-150px;animation:drift 20s ease-in-out infinite;}
.o2{width:450px;height:450px;background:rgba(6,182,212,.04);bottom:-120px;right:-80px;animation:drift 26s ease-in-out infinite reverse;}
@keyframes drift{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}50%{transform:translate(40px,-30px)}}
.grid-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;
  background-image:linear-gradient(rgba(99,102,241,.018)1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(99,102,241,.018)1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:52px 52px;}

/* ── TOPBAR ── */
.topbar{position:relative;z-index:20;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;
  padding:0 24px;height:54px;
  background:rgba(5,7,14,.9);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.tb-logo{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#a78bfa,#06b6d4);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
.tb-sep{color:var(--muted);font-size:14px}
.tb-label{font-size:13px;color:var(--muted);}
.chip{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;border-radius:20px;padding:3px 10px;}
.chip-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;animation:blink 1.5s infinite;}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.2}}
.c-g{background:rgba(16,185,129,.1);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.2);color:#34d399;}.c-g .chip-dot{background:#10b981;}
.c-p{background:rgba(139,92,246,.1);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.2);color:#a78bfa;}.c-p .chip-dot{background:#8b5cf6;}
.tb-clock{margin-left:auto;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;font-size:12px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:7px;padding:3px 10px;color:var(--text);}

/* ── MAIN LAYOUT ── */
.main{position:relative;z-index:10;display:grid;grid-template-columns:300px 1fr;min-height:calc(100vh - 54px);}

/* ══ LEFT SIDEBAR ══ */
.sidebar{border-right:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(9,12,24,.6);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;padding:20px 16px;gap:14px;overflow-y:auto;}

/* Di avatar compact */
.di-sidebar-hdr{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  padding:12px;background:rgba(139,92,246,.08);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.15);
  border-radius:14px;}
.di-ava{width:46px;height:46px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;
  border:2px solid rgba(139,92,246,.35);position:relative;}
.di-ava img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;}
.di-ava::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:50%;
  background:conic-gradient(from 0deg,transparent 30%,rgba(139,92,246,.4)50%,transparent 70%);
  animation:spin 5s linear infinite;}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg)}}
.di-id{flex:1;}
.di-name{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:800;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#c4b5fd,#a78bfa);
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
.di-role{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px;}
.di-online{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:#34d399;margin-top:3px;}
.di-online-dot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#10b981;animation:blink 1.5s infinite;}

/* Condo selector */
.sec-label{font-size:10px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);letter-spacing:.5px;text-transform:uppercase;}
.condo-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
.condo-btn{padding:10px 12px;border-radius:11px;border:1px solid var(--border);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;text-align:left;}
.condo-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-color:var(--border2);}
.condo-btn.active{background:rgba(139,92,246,.1);border-color:rgba(139,92,246,.3);}
.condo-btn-name{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);}
.condo-btn-sub{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}
.condo-btn-score{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;}

/* Period selector */
.period-row{display:flex;gap:6px;}
.period-btn{flex:1;padding:7px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--border);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--muted);transition:all .2s;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;}
.period-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
.period-btn.active{background:rgba(139,92,246,.12);border-color:rgba(139,92,246,.3);color:var(--lav);}

/* Generate button */
.gen-btn{width:100%;padding:13px;border-radius:12px;border:none;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#4c1d95);color:#fff;
  font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer;transition:all .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;}
.gen-btn:hover:not(:disabled){transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 6px 24px rgba(124,58,237,.4);}
.gen-btn:disabled{opacity:.5;cursor:not-allowed;transform:none;}
.gen-btn.generating{animation:gen-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes gen-pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.6}}

/* Section status list */
.section-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
.section-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 10px;border-radius:9px;
  font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);transition:all .2s;cursor:pointer;}
.section-item:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text);}
.section-item.done{color:var(--text);}
.section-item.active-sec{background:rgba(139,92,246,.08);color:var(--lav);}
.sec-icon{font-size:14px;width:20px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.sec-check{width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--muted);
  margin-left:auto;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:9px;}
.sec-check.done{background:#10b981;border-color:#10b981;color:#fff;}
.sec-check.active{background:rgba(139,92,246,.3);border-color:var(--violet);animation:blink .8s infinite;}

/* ══ RIGHT: REPORT AREA ══ */
.report-area{padding:24px;overflow-y:auto;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:16px;}

/* Idle state */
.idle-state{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  flex:1;padding:60px;text-align:center;gap:16px;min-height:500px;}
.idle-icon{font-size:56px;opacity:.3;}
.idle-title{font-size:20px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);opacity:.5;}
.idle-sub{font-size:14px;color:var(--muted);}

/* Report header */
.report-header{background:rgba(9,12,24,.8);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;
  overflow:hidden;}
.rh-banner{padding:18px 22px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(124,58,237,.15),rgba(6,182,212,.08));
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;}
.rh-av{width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;border:2px solid rgba(139,92,246,.4);flex-shrink:0;}
.rh-av img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;}
.rh-info{flex:1;}
.rh-name{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:16px;font-weight:800;color:var(--text);}
.rh-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}
.rh-meta{text-align:right;}
.rh-score{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:28px;font-weight:800;color:var(--lav);}
.rh-score-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);}
.rh-ts{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace;}

/* KPI strip */
.kpi-strip{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.kpi-cell{padding:12px 14px;border-right:1px solid var(--border);}
.kpi-cell:last-child{border:none;}
.kpi-val{font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:20px;font-weight:700;line-height:1;}
.kpi-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;}
.kpi-delta{font-size:10px;margin-top:2px;}
.up{color:var(--emerald);}.dn{color:var(--red);}.neu{color:var(--muted);}

/* Di Analysis streaming box */
.di-analysis-box{background:rgba(9,12,24,.8);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.2);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;}
.dab-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:14px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  background:rgba(139,92,246,.06);}
.dab-av{width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;border:1.5px solid rgba(139,92,246,.4);flex-shrink:0;}
.dab-av img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;object-position:center top;}
.dab-label{font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--lav);}
.dab-sublabel{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:1px;}
.dab-status{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;}
.dab-streaming-dot{width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--lav);animation:blink .7s infinite;}
.dab-body{padding:16px 18px;font-size:13px;line-height:1.75;color:var(--text);min-height:80px;}
.dab-body strong{color:var(--lav);}
.dab-body .alert-txt{color:#fbbf24;}
.dab-body .ok-txt{color:var(--emerald);}
.cursor{display:inline-block;width:2px;height:13px;background:var(--lav);
  margin-left:2px;vertical-align:text-bottom;animation:cblink .6s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes cblink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:0}}

/* Module sections */
.report-section{background:rgba(9,12,24,.7);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;overflow:hidden;}
.rs-header{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:13px 18px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);}
.rs-icon{font-size:16px;}
.rs-title{font-size:13px;font-weight:600;color:var(--text);}
.rs-badge{font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;margin-left:auto;}
.rs-ok{background:rgba(16,185,129,.12);color:#34d399;border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.2);}
.rs-warn{background:rgba(245,158,11,.12);color:#fbbf24;border:1px solid rgba(245,158,11,.2);}
.rs-alert{background:rgba(239,68,68,.12);color:#f87171;border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.2);}
.rs-info{background:rgba(139,92,246,.12);color:var(--lav);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.2);}
.rs-body{padding:16px 18px;}

/* KPI row inside sections */
.sec-kpi-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.sec-kpi{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;}
.sec-kpi-val{font-size:18px;font-weight:700;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;line-height:1;}
.sec-kpi-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:2px;}

/* Mini table */
.mini-table{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;font-size:12px;}
.mini-table th{text-align:left;padding:6px 8px;color:var(--muted);font-weight:600;font-size:10px;
  letter-spacing:.3px;text-transform:uppercase;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.mini-table td{padding:8px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text);}
.mini-table tr:last-child td{border:none;}
.mini-table tr:hover td{background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);}

/* Progress bar */
.prog-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:6px;}
.prog-label{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);width:120px;flex-shrink:0;}
.prog-track{flex:1;height:5px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;}
.prog-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .8s ease;}
.prog-val{font-size:11px;font-weight:600;width:30px;text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;}

/* OS rows */
.os-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.04);}
.os-row:last-child{border:none;}
.os-priority{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
.os-name{flex:1;font-size:12px;font-weight:500;}
.os-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.os-badge{font-size:9px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:20px;}

/* IoT grid */
.iot-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:8px;}
.iot-card{background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;position:relative;}
.iot-val{font-size:16px;font-weight:700;font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;line-height:1;}
.iot-label{font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;}
.iot-status{font-size:10px;margin-top:4px;}
.iot-live-dot{position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#10b981;animation:blink 1.5s infinite;}

/* Recommendations */
.rec-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;}
.rec-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:10px;padding:10px 12px;
  border-radius:10px;border:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.03);}
.rec-num{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:11px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;}
.rec-body{flex:1;}
.rec-title{font-size:12px;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
.rec-meta{font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);}
.rec-urgent{border-color:rgba(239,68,68,.2);background:rgba(239,68,68,.04);}
.rec-medium{border-color:rgba(245,158,11,.15);background:rgba(245,158,11,.03);}

/* Chart containers */
.chart-wrap{position:relative;width:100%;height:160px;margin-bottom:8px;}

/* Action footer */
.report-footer{background:rgba(9,12,24,.8);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;
  padding:14px 18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.footer-label{font-size:12px;color:var(--muted);flex:1;}
.footer-btn{padding:8px 16px;border-radius:10px;font-size:12px;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;
  border:1px solid var(--border);background:rgba(255,255,255,.04);color:var(--text);
  transition:all .2s;font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;}
.footer-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);}
.footer-btn.primary{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#4c1d95);border:none;color:#fff;}
.footer-btn.primary:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(124,58,237,.35);}

/* Scrollbar */
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--dim);border-radius:4px}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div class="bg-scene"><div class="orb o1"></div><div class="orb o2"></div></div>
<div class="grid-bg"></div>

<!-- TOPBAR -->
<div class="topbar">
  <div class="tb-logo">ImobCore</div>
  <span class="tb-sep">/</span>
  <span class="tb-label">Di · Gerador de Relatório Executivo</span>
  <div class="chip c-g" style="margin-left:8px"><div class="chip-dot"></div>Claude API</div>
  <div class="chip c-p"><div class="chip-dot"></div>Tempo real</div>
  <div class="tb-clock" id="clock">00:00:00</div>
</div>

<div class="main">

  <!-- ══ SIDEBAR ══ -->
  <div class="sidebar">

    <!-- Di identity -->
    <div class="di-sidebar-hdr">
      <div class="di-ava"><img id="diAva" src="" alt="Di"/></div>
      <div class="di-id">
        <div class="di-name">Di</div>
        <div class="di-role">Síndica Virtual IA · ImobCore v2</div>
        <div class="di-online"><div class="di-online-dot"></div>Gerando relatórios</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Condo selector -->
    <div class="sec-label">Selecionar condomínio</div>
    <div class="condo-list">
      <button class="condo-btn active" onclick="selectCondo(0,this)" id="condo-btn-0">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;">
          <div>
            <div class="condo-btn-name">Copacabana Beach</div>
            <div class="condo-btn-sub">Ingleses · 184 unid. · PRO</div>
          </div>
          <div class="condo-btn-score" style="color:#f59e0b;">77</div>
        </div>
      </button>
      <button class="condo-btn" onclick="selectCondo(1,this)" id="condo-btn-1">
        <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;">
          <div>
            <div class="condo-btn-name">Parque das Flores</div>
            <div class="condo-btn-sub">Canto do Lamir · 168 unid. · PRO</div>
          </div>
          <div class="condo-btn-score" style="color:#10b981;">84</div>
        </div>
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Period -->
    <div class="sec-label">Período do relatório</div>
    <div class="period-row">
      <button class="period-btn" onclick="setPeriod('jan',this)">Jan</button>
      <button class="period-btn" onclick="setPeriod('fev',this)">Fev</button>
      <button class="period-btn active" onclick="setPeriod('mar',this)">Mar</button>
      <button class="period-btn" onclick="setPeriod('tri',this)">Tri</button>
      <button class="period-btn" onclick="setPeriod('ano',this)">Ano</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Generate -->
    <button class="gen-btn" id="genBtn" onclick="generateReport()">
      <span id="genBtnIcon">🧠</span>
      <span id="genBtnLabel">Gerar Relatório com Di</span>
    </button>

    <!-- Section checklist -->
    <div class="sec-label">Seções do relatório</div>
    <div class="section-list" id="sectionList">
      <div class="section-item" data-sec="kpi"><span class="sec-icon">📊</span>Indicadores-chave<div class="sec-check" id="sc-kpi"></div></div>
      <div class="section-item" data-sec="di"><span class="sec-icon">🤖</span>Análise da Di<div class="sec-check" id="sc-di"></div></div>
      <div class="section-item" data-sec="fin"><span class="sec-icon">💰</span>Financeiro<div class="sec-check" id="sc-fin"></div></div>
      <div class="section-item" data-sec="os"><span class="sec-icon">🔧</span>Ordens de serviço<div class="sec-check" id="sc-os"></div></div>
      <div class="section-item" data-sec="iot"><span class="sec-icon">📡</span>IoT & Sensores<div class="sec-check" id="sc-iot"></div></div>
      <div class="section-item" data-sec="sat"><span class="sec-icon">⭐</span>Satisfação<div class="sec-check" id="sc-sat"></div></div>
      <div class="section-item" data-sec="rec"><span class="sec-icon">✅</span>Plano de ação<div class="sec-check" id="sc-rec"></div></div>
    </div>

    <!-- Quick actions -->
    <div class="sec-label">Ações rápidas</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;">
      <button class="footer-btn" style="width:100%;text-align:left;" onclick="exportPDF()">📄 Exportar PDF</button>
      <button class="footer-btn" style="width:100%;text-align:left;" onclick="sendWhatsApp()">💬 Enviar via WhatsApp</button>
      <button class="footer-btn" style="width:100%;text-align:left;" onclick="scheduleReport()">🕐 Agendar automático</button>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /sidebar -->

  <!-- ══ REPORT AREA ══ -->
  <div class="report-area" id="reportArea">
    <div class="idle-state" id="idleState">
      <div class="idle-icon">🧠</div>
      <div class="idle-title">Di está pronta para gerar o relatório</div>
      <div class="idle-sub">Selecione o condomínio, o período e clique em<br><strong style="color:var(--lav)">Gerar Relatório com Di</strong></div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div><!-- /main -->

<script>
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
//  DATA & STATE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
document.getElementById('diAva').src = "data:image/jpeg;base64,";

        {cat:'Lazer',val:4.2,delta:'-0.1'},
      ],
      recs:[
        {prior:1,type:'urgente',title:'Atribuir OS urgentes CB-047 e CB-051',meta:'Hoje · Síndico · Evitar R$ 15k emergencial'},
        {prior:2,type:'urgente',title:'Diagnosticar câmeras Subsolo B e Garagem Ext.',meta:'Hoje · Zelador · Segurança 100%'},
        {prior:3,type:'medio',title:'Acionar jurídico — 4 inadimplentes +60 dias',meta:'Esta semana · Administradora · Recuperar R$ 7.265'},
        {prior:4,type:'normal',title:'Investigar consumo elétrico +8%',meta:'Abril · Zelador · Reduzir custo'},
        {prior:5,type:'normal',title:'Convocar assembleia prestação de contas',meta:'Abril · Síndico · Transparência'},
      ],
      diAnalysis:`O <strong>Copacabana Beach Residence</strong> apresenta <span class="alert-txt"><strong>2 pontos críticos</strong></span> que requerem ação imediata: as OSs urgentes <strong>#CB-047</strong> (elevador) e <strong>#CB-051</strong> (bomba piscina) estão há 28h sem atribuição, com risco crescente de reclamações formais e custo emergencial estimado de até R$ 15k.\n\nNo financeiro, a adimplência caiu 2pp para <strong>94%</strong> — ainda saudável, mas 9 unidades sem acordo ativo somam R$ 19.050 em aberto. O fundo de reserva em <span class="ok-txt"><strong>R$ 68.400</strong></span> é ponto positivo, acima da média regional por unidade.\n\nSensores IoT indicam consumo elétrico <strong>+8%</strong> acima da média — Di recomenda verificação de equipamentos em operação contínua. O score de <strong>77/100</strong> pode atingir <span class="ok-txt"><strong>83/100</strong></span> com o plano de ação desta semana.`,
    }
  },
  {
    id:'parque', name:'Residencial Parque das Flores',
    bairro:'Canto do Lamir, Florianópolis/SC', unidades:168, plano:'PRO',
    sindico:'Ricardo Gestor', score:84,
    data:{
      receita:284750, adimpl:99, fundo:48000, agua:36, satisfacao:4.3,
      osUrgentes:0, osTotal:5, inadimp:2, inadimpVal:3700,
      kwhDia:3.2, temp:23.8, ph:7.1, cameras:'8/8',
      receitaMeses:[261,268,270,272,278,284],
      adimplMeses:[99,100,99,100,99,99],
      inadimplMeses:[1.2,1.0,0.8,1.0,0.5,1.0],
      inadimplTop:[
        {apt:'204',val:'R$ 2.100',dias:45,status:'Notificado',acao:'Aguardar'},
        {apt:'317',val:'R$ 1.600',dias:31,status:'1ª notif.',acao:'Aguardar'},
      ],
      os:[
        {id:'PF-039',desc:'Iluminação área externa — 6 luminárias',prior:'normal',resp:'João Zelador',tempo:'2d',custo:'R$ 240'},
        {id:'PF-041',desc:'Portão pedestre — mola desgastada',prior:'medio',resp:'Garen Serv.',tempo:'1d',custo:'R$ 180'},
        {id:'PF-035',desc:'Reservatório Torre B — nível baixo 36%',prior:'medio',resp:'Equipe IoT',tempo:'12h',custo:'R$ 0'},
        {id:'PF-033',desc:'Pintura corredor 2° andar — desgaste',prior:'normal',resp:'Pendente',tempo:'5d',custo:'R$ 600'},
        {id:'PF-028',desc:'Jardim — poda mensal programada',prior:'normal',resp:'Verde Vida',tempo:'3d',custo:'R$ 350'},
      ],
      iot:[
        {label:'Reservatório',val:'36%',status:'Atenção baixo',color:'#f59e0b'},
        {label:'Temperatura',val:'23.8°C',status:'Normal',color:'#10b981'},
        {label:'Energia',val:'3.2 kWh',status:'Eficiente -8%',color:'#10b981'},
        {label:'pH Piscina',val:'7.1',status:'Normal',color:'#10b981'},
        {label:'Sensores',val:'5/5',status:'Online',color:'#10b981'},
        {label:'Câmeras',val:'8/8',status:'Online',color:'#10b981'},
      ],
      sat:[
        {cat:'Limpeza',val:4.6,delta:'+0.2'},
        {cat:'Segurança',val:4.5,delta:'+0.1'},
        {cat:'Manutenção',val:4.1,delta:'+0.3'},
        {cat:'Comunicação',val:4.2,delta:'0.0'},
        {cat:'Lazer',val:4.3,delta:'+0.1'},
      ],
      recs:[
        {prior:1,type:'urgente',title:'Reabastecer reservatório Torre B — 36% crítico',meta:'Hoje · Zelador · Garantir autonomia de 6 dias'},
        {prior:2,type:'medio',title:'Agendar revisão preventiva elevadores (semestral)',meta:'Abril · Neomot · R$ 800 total'},
        {prior:3,type:'medio',title:'Solicitar 2º orçamento para pintura corredor',meta:'Esta semana · Síndico · R$ 600 estimado'},
        {prior:4,type:'normal',title:'Notificar 2 inadimplentes antes do vencimento',meta:'Esta semana · Administradora'},
        {prior:5,type:'normal',title:'Publicar resultado pesquisa satisfação (4.3/5)',meta:'Esta semana · Síndico · Engajamento'},
      ],
      diAnalysis:`O <strong>Residencial Parque das Flores</strong> está em excelente situação geral com score <span class="ok-txt"><strong>84/100</strong></span>, acima da média regional. A adimplência de <span class="ok-txt"><strong>99%</strong></span> e satisfação de <span class="ok-txt"><strong>4.3/5</strong></span> são pontos de destaque.\n\nO único <span class="alert-txt"><strong>alerta crítico</strong></span> é o reservatório da Torre B em <strong>36%</strong> — nível de atenção que requer reabastecimento hoje para garantir autonomia mínima de 6 dias. O sensor ESP32 está transmitindo dados em tempo real.\n\nNa parte financeira, situação saudável com fundo de reserva de <span class="ok-txt"><strong>R$ 48.000</strong></span> e apenas 2 inadimplentes sem urgência. O consumo elétrico <strong>-8% abaixo da média</strong> demonstra eficiência operacional. Score pode atingir <span class="ok-txt"><strong>88/100</strong></span> com resolução do reservatório.`,
    }
  }
];

let selectedCondoIdx = 0;
let selectedPeriod = 'mar';
let isGenerating = false;
let chartInstances = [];

// ── Clock ──────────────────────────────────
setInterval(()=>{
  document.getElementById('clock').textContent = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR');
},1000);

// ── Selectors ──────────────────────────────
function selectCondo(idx, btn){
  selectedCondoIdx = idx;
  document.querySelectorAll('.condo-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
}
function setPeriod(p, btn){
  selectedPeriod = p;
  document.querySelectorAll('.period-btn').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
}

// ── Sec checks ─────────────────────────────
function setSec(id, state){ // 'idle'|'active'|'done'
  const el = document.getElementById('sc-'+id);
  const item = document.querySelector(`[data-sec="${id}"]`);
  if(!el||!item) return;
  el.className = 'sec-check';
  item.className = 'section-item';
  if(state==='active'){ el.classList.add('active'); el.textContent=''; item.classList.add('active-sec'); }
  if(state==='done'){   el.classList.add('done');   el.textContent='✓'; item.classList.add('done'); }
}
function resetSecs(){ ['kpi','di','fin','os','iot','sat','rec'].forEach(s=>setSec(s,'idle')); }

// ── Destroy charts ──────────────────────────
function destroyCharts(){
  chartInstances.forEach(c=>{ try{c.destroy();}catch(e){} });
  chartInstances = [];
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
//  MAIN GENERATOR
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════
async function generateReport(){
  if(isGenerating) return;
  isGenerating = true;
  destroyCharts();
  resetSecs();

  const btn = document.getElementById('genBtn');
  const lbl = document.getElementById('genBtnLabel');
  const ico = document.getElementById('genBtnIcon');
  btn.disabled = true;
  btn.classList.add('generating');
  lbl.textContent = 'Di gerando relatório...';
  ico.textContent = '⏳';

  const condo = CONDOS[selectedCondoIdx];
  const D = condo.data;
  const period = selectedPeriod === 'tri' ? '1° Trimestre 2026' :
                 selectedPeriod === 'ano' ? 'Ano 2026' :
                 selectedPeriod === 'jan' ? 'Janeiro 2026' :
                 selectedPeriod === 'fev' ? 'Fevereiro 2026' : 'Março 2026';

  const area = document.getElementById('reportArea');
  document.getElementById('idleState')?.remove();

  const delay = ms => new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r,ms));

  // ── 1. HEADER ──────────────────────────────
  area.innerHTML = '';

  const header = document.createElement('div');
  header.className = 'report-header';
  header.style.opacity='0';
  header.style.transform='translateY(12px)';
  header.style.transition='all .4s ease';
  header.innerHTML = `
    <div class="rh-banner">
      <div class="rh-av"><img src="${document.getElementById('diAva').src}" alt="Di"/></div>
      <div class="rh-info">
        <div class="rh-name">${condo.name}</div>
        <div class="rh-sub">${condo.bairro} · ${condo.unidades} unidades · Plano ${condo.plano} · Síndico: ${condo.sindico}</div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;margin-top:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
          <span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(139,92,246,.12);color:var(--lav);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.2);">Relatório Executivo</span>
          <span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(139,92,246,.12);color:var(--lav);border:1px solid rgba(139,92,246,.2);">${period}</span>
          <span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;border-radius:20px;background:rgba(16,185,129,.12);color:#34d399;border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.2);">claude-sonnet-4</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="rh-meta">
        <div class="rh-score">${condo.score}</div>
        <div class="rh-score-label">Score IA /100</div>
        <div class="rh-ts" id="rh-ts">${new Date().toLocaleString('pt-BR')}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="kpi-strip">
      <div class="kpi-cell"><div class="kpi-val" style="color:#10b981">R$ ${(D.receita/1000).toFixed(0)}k</div><div class="kpi-label">Receita mensal</div><div class="kpi-delta up">▲ +3%</div></div>
      <div class="kpi-cell"><div class="kpi-val" style="color:${D.adimpl>=95?'#10b981':'#f59e0b'}">${D.adimpl}%</div><div class="kpi-label">Adimplência</div><div class="kpi-delta ${D.adimpl>=95?'up':'dn'}">${D.adimpl>=95?'▲ +1%':'▼ -2%'}</div></div>
      <div class="kpi-cell"><div class="kpi-val">R$ ${(D.fundo/1000).toFixed(0)}k</div><div class="kpi-label">Fundo reserva</div><div class="kpi-delta up">▲ +R$ 4k</div></div>
      <div class="kpi-cell"><div class="kpi-val" style="color:${D.agua<50?'#f59e0b':'#06b6d4'}">${D.agua}%</div><div class="kpi-label">Reservatório</div><div class="kpi-delta neu">IoT ao vivo</div></div>
      <div class="kpi-cell"><div class="kpi-val" style="color:${D.osUrgentes>0?'#ef4444':'#10b981'}">${D.osUrgentes}</div><div class="kpi-label">OSs urgentes</div><div class="kpi-delta ${D.osUrgentes>0?'dn':'up'}">${D.osUrgentes>0?'Ação imediata':'Sem urgentes'}</div></div>
    </div>`;
  area.appendChild(header);
  setSec('kpi','active');
  await delay(50); header.style.opacity='1'; header.style.transform='none';
  await delay(600); setSec('kpi','done');

  // ── 2. DI ANALYSIS ─────────────────────────
  setSec('di','active');
  lbl.textContent = 'Di analisando dados...';

  const diBox = document.createElement('div');
  diBox.className = 'di-analysis-box';
  diBox.style.opacity='0'; diBox.style.transform='translateY(12px)'; diBox.style.transition='all .4s ease';
  diBox.innerHTML = `
    <div class="dab-header">
      <div class="dab-av"><img src="${document.getElementById('diAva').src}" alt="Di"/></div>
      <div><div class="dab-label">Análise executiva — Di Síndica Virtual</div>
        <div class="dab-sublabel">claude-sonnet-4 · ImobCore v2 · ${new Date().toLocaleTimeString('pt-BR')}</div></div>
      <div class="dab-status" id="dab-status"><div class="dab-streaming-dot"></div>Gerando...</div>
    </div>
    <div class="dab-body" id="dab-body"></div>`;
  area.appendChild(diBox);
  await delay(50); diBox.style.opacity='1'; diBox.style.transform='none';

  // Stream Di analysis
  await streamDiAnalysis(D.diAnalysis, 'dab-body');
  document.getElementById('dab-status').innerHTML = '✓ Concluído';
  setSec('di','done');

  // ── 3. FINANCEIRO ──────────────────────────
  setSec('fin','active');
  lbl.textContent = 'Compilando dados financeiros...';
  await delay(300);

  const finSec = createSection('💰','Financeiro','rs-ok',
    `Receita R$ ${(D.receita/1000).toFixed(0)}k · Adimplência ${D.adimpl}% · Fundo R$ ${(D.fundo/1000).toFixed(0)}k`);
  area.appendChild(finSec.el);
  await delay(50); finSec.el.style.opacity='1'; finSec.el.style.transform='none';

  const finBody = finSec.body;
  finBody.innerHTML = `
    <div class="sec-kpi-row" style="margin-bottom:14px;">
      <div class="sec-kpi"><div class="sec-kpi-val" style="color:#10b981;">R$ ${(D.receita/1000).toFixed(0)}k</div><div class="sec-kpi-label">Receita mensal</div></div>
      <div class="sec-kpi"><div class="sec-kpi-val" style="color:${D.adimpl>=95?'#10b981':'#f59e0b'};">${D.adimpl}%</div><div class="sec-kpi-label">Adimplência</div></div>
      <div class="sec-kpi"><div class="sec-kpi-val" style="color:#10b981;">R$ ${(D.fundo/1000).toFixed(0)}k</div><div class="sec-kpi-label">Fundo reserva</div></div>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;">Histórico receita (6 meses)</div>
    <div class="chart-wrap"><canvas id="chartFin"></canvas></div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:14px;margin-bottom:14px;font-size:11px;color:var(--muted);">
      <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;background:#7c3aed;display:inline-block;"></span>Receita (R$k)</span>
      <span style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;"><span style="width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:2px;background:#f59e0b;display:inline-block;"></span>Inadimplência (%)</span>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);margin-bottom:6px;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.4px;">Top inadimplentes</div>
    <table class="mini-table">
      <thead><tr><th>Apto</th><th>Valor</th><th>Dias</th><th>Status</th><th>Ação</th></tr></thead>
      <tbody>${D.inadimplTop.map(r=>`
        <tr><td>${r.apt}</td><td style="color:${r.dias>60?'#ef4444':'#f59e0b'}">${r.val}</td><td>${r.dias}</td>
        <td><span style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:20px;background:${r.status.includes('acordo')||r.status.includes('Acordo')?'rgba(16,185,129,.12)':'rgba(245,158,11,.12)'};color:${r.status.includes('acordo')||r.status.includes('Acordo')?'#34d399':'#fbbf24'}">${r.status}</span></td>
        <td style="color:var(--muted);">${r.acao}</td></tr>`).join('')}
      </tbody>
    </table>`;

  await delay(100);
  const ctxFin = document.getElementById('chartFin');
  if(ctxFin){
    chartInstances.push(new Chart(ctxFin,{
      data:{
        labels:['Out','Nov','Dez','Jan','Fev','Mar'],
        datasets:[
          {type:'bar',label:'Receita',data:D.receitaMeses,backgroundColor:'rgba(124,58,237,.4)',borderColor:'#7c3aed',borderWidth:1.5,borderRadius:3,yAxisID:'y'},
          {type:'line',label:'Inadimpl.',data:D.inadimplMeses,borderColor:'#f59e0b',borderWidth:2,pointRadius:3,pointBackgroundColor:'#f59e0b',tension:.4,fill:false,yAxisID:'y2'}
        ]
      },
      options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,
        plugins:{legend:{display:false}},
        scales:{
          x:{ticks:{color:'#4a5578',font:{size:10}},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'}},
          y:{position:'left',ticks:{color:'#4a5578',font:{size:10},callback:v=>'R$'+v+'k'},grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.04)'}},
          y2:{position:'right',ticks:{color:'#4a5578',font:{size:10},callback:v=>v+'%'},grid:{display:false}}
        }}
    }));
  }
  setSec('fin','done');

  // ── 4. OSs ─────────────────────────────────
  setSec('os','active');
  lbl.textContent = 'Processando ordens de serviço...';
  await delay(400);

  const osSec = createSection('🔧','Ordens de Serviço',
    D.osUrgentes>0?'rs-alert':'rs-ok',
    `${D.osTotal} abertas · ${D.osUrgentes} urgentes`);
  area.appendChild(osSec.el);
  await delay(50); osSec.el.style.opacity='1'; osSec.el.style.transform='none';

  const pColor = {urgente:'#ef4444',medio:'#f59e0b',normal:'#10b981'};
  const pLabel = {urgente:'Urgente',medio:'Médio',normal:'Normal'};
  const pBadge = {urgente:'rs-alert',medio:'rs-warn',normal:'rs-ok'};
  osSec.body.innerHTML = `
    ${D.os.map(o=>`
      <div class="os-row">
        <div class="os-priority" style="background:${pColor[o.prior]};"></div>
        <div style="flex:1;min-width:0;">
          <div class="os-name">${o.id} — ${o.desc}</div>
          <div class="os-meta">${o.resp} · ${o.custo}</div>
        </div>
        <div style="text-align:right;flex-shrink:0;">
          <span class="os-badge ${pBadge[o.prior]}" style="font-size:9px;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:20px;">${pLabel[o.prior]}</span>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);margin-top:3px;">${o.tempo}</div>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('')}
    ${D.osUrgentes>0 ? `
    <div style="margin-top:10px;padding:8px 12px;background:rgba(239,68,68,.08);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.2);border-radius:9px;font-size:12px;color:#f87171;">
      Impacto: custo preventivo R$ 2–4k vs emergencial R$ 8–15k. Atribuição imediata reduz risco.
    </div>` : ''}`;
  setSec('os','done');

  // ── 5. IoT ─────────────────────────────────
  setSec('iot','active');
  lbl.textContent = 'Sincronizando sensores IoT...';
  await delay(400);

  const iotSec = createSection('📡','IoT & Sensores','rs-info','Dados em tempo real · ESP32');
  area.appendChild(iotSec.el);
  await delay(50); iotSec.el.style.opacity='1'; iotSec.el.style.transform='none';

  iotSec.body.innerHTML = `
    <div class="iot-grid">
      ${D.iot.map(s=>`
        <div class="iot-card">
          <div class="iot-live-dot"></div>
          <div class="iot-val" style="color:${s.color};">${s.val}</div>
          <div class="iot-label">${s.label}</div>
          <div class="iot-status" style="color:${s.color};">${s.status}</div>
        </div>`).join('')}
    </div>`;
  setSec('iot','done');

  // ── 6. SATISFAÇÃO ──────────────────────────
  setSec('sat','active');
  lbl.textContent = 'Analisando satisfação dos moradores...';
  await delay(400);

  const satSec = createSection('⭐','Satisfação dos Moradores','rs-ok',
    `${D.satisfacao.toFixed(1)}/5.0 · ${condo.id==='copacabana'?38:42} avaliações`);
  area.appendChild(satSec.el);
  await delay(50); satSec.el.style.opacity='1'; satSec.el.style.transform='none';

  satSec.body.innerHTML = `
    <div style="margin-bottom:10px;">
      ${D.sat.map(s=>{
        const pct = (s.val/5)*100;
        const col = s.val>=4.3?'#10b981':s.val>=4.0?'#06b6d4':'#f59e0b';
        return `<div class="prog-row">
          <div class="prog-label">${s.cat}</div>
          <div class="prog-track"><div class="prog-fill" style="width:${pct}%;background:${col};"></div></div>
          <div class="prog-val" style="color:${col};">${s.val.toFixed(1)}</div>
          <div style="font-size:10px;color:var(--muted);width:30px;text-align:right;">${s.delta}</div>
        </div>`;
      }).join('')}
    </div>
    <div class="chart-wrap" style="height:130px;"><canvas id="chartSat"></canvas></div>`;

  await delay(100);
  const ctxSat = document.getElementById('chartSat');
  if(ctxSat){
    chartInstances.push(new Chart(ctxSat,{
      type:'radar',
      data:{
        labels:D.sat.map(s=>s.cat),
        datasets:[{
          data:D.sat.map(s=>s.val),
          borderColor:'#7c3aed',backgroundColor:'rgba(124,58,237,.15)',
          borderWidth:2,pointRadius:3,pointBackgroundColor:'#7c3aed'
        }]
      },
      options:{responsive:true,maintainAspectRatio:false,
        plugins:{legend:{display:false}},
        scales:{r:{min:3,max:5,ticks:{display:false},
          grid:{color:'rgba(255,255,255,.06)'},
          pointLabels:{font:{size:9},color:'#4a5578'}}}}
    }));
  }
  setSec('sat','done');

  // ── 7. RECOMENDAÇÕES ───────────────────────
  setSec('rec','active');
  lbl.textContent = 'Gerando plano de ação...';
  await delay(400);

  const recSec = createSection('✅','Plano de Ação — Recomendações','rs-info',
    `${D.recs.length} ações · geradas pela Di`);
  area.appendChild(recSec.el);
  await delay(50); recSec.el.style.opacity='1'; recSec.el.style.transform='none';

  recSec.body.innerHTML = `<div class="rec-list">
    ${D.recs.map(r=>`
      <div class="rec-item ${r.type==='urgente'?'rec-urgent':r.type==='medio'?'rec-medium':''}">
        <div class="rec-num" style="background:${r.type==='urgente'?'rgba(239,68,68,.15)':r.type==='medio'?'rgba(245,158,11,.15)':'rgba(16,185,129,.15)'};color:${r.type==='urgente'?'#f87171':r.type==='medio'?'#fbbf24':'#34d399'};">${r.prior}</div>
        <div class="rec-body">
          <div class="rec-title">${r.title}</div>
          <div class="rec-meta">${r.meta}</div>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('')}
  </div>`;
  setSec('rec','done');

  // ── FOOTER ─────────────────────────────────
  await delay(300);
  const footer = document.createElement('div');
  footer.className = 'report-footer';
  footer.style.opacity='0'; footer.style.transition='opacity .4s ease';
  footer.innerHTML = `
    <div class="footer-label">🤖 Relatório gerado por Di — Síndica Virtual IA · claude-sonnet-4 · ${new Date().toLocaleString('pt-BR')}</div>
    <button class="footer-btn primary" onclick="exportPDF()">📄 Exportar PDF</button>
    <button class="footer-btn" onclick="sendWhatsApp()">💬 WhatsApp</button>
    <button class="footer-btn" onclick="scheduleReport()">🕐 Agendar</button>`;
  area.appendChild(footer);
  await delay(50); footer.style.opacity='1';

  // Reset button
  btn.disabled=false; btn.classList.remove('generating');
  ico.textContent='🔄'; lbl.textContent='Atualizar Relatório';
  isGenerating=false;
}

// ── Section helper ─────────────────────────
function createSection(icon, title, badgeClass, badgeText){
  const el = document.createElement('div');
  el.className='report-section';
  el.style.opacity='0'; el.style.transform='translateY(12px)'; el.style.transition='all .4s ease';
  const body = document.createElement('div');
  body.className='rs-body';
  el.innerHTML=`
    <div class="rs-header">
      <span class="rs-icon">${icon}</span>
      <span class="rs-title">${title}</span>
      <span class="rs-badge ${badgeClass}">${badgeText}</span>
    </div>`;
  el.appendChild(body);
  return {el, body};
}

// ── Stream Di text ─────────────────────────
async function streamDiAnalysis(text, targetId){
  const el = document.getElementById(targetId);
  if(!el) return;
  // Remove HTML tags for character-by-character, then restore
  const paragraphs = text.split('\n\n');
  el.innerHTML = '';
  for(const para of paragraphs){
    const p = document.createElement('p');
    p.style.marginBottom='10px';
    el.appendChild(p);
    // Typewriter with HTML support — chunk by chunks
    const chars = para;
    let displayed = '';
    const cursor = document.createElement('span');
    cursor.className='cursor';
    p.appendChild(cursor);
    for(let i=0;i<chars.length;i++){
      displayed += chars[i];
      p.innerHTML = displayed;
      p.appendChild(cursor);
      await new Promise(r=>setTimeout(r, chars[i]==='<'?0:14));
    }
    cursor.remove();
  }
}

// ── Action stubs ───────────────────────────
function exportPDF(){
  alert('Em produção: Di gera PDF via Python/ReportLab no servidor Replit e disponibiliza para download.');
}
function sendWhatsApp(){
  const condo = CONDOS[selectedCondoIdx];
  const msg = encodeURIComponent(
    `📊 *Relatório Executivo — ${condo.name}*\n\nScore: ${condo.score}/100\nAdimplência: ${condo.data.adimpl}%\nReceita: R$ ${(condo.data.receita/1000).toFixed(0)}k\nOSs urgentes: ${condo.data.osUrgentes}\n\nGerado por Di — ImobCore v2`
  );
  window.open(`https://wa.me/?text=${msg}`, '_blank');
}
function scheduleReport(){
  alert('Em produção: configurar cron job no Cloudflare Workers para gerar e enviar relatório automaticamente todo dia 1° do mês.');
}

// ── Auto-generate on load ──────────────────
setTimeout(()=>generateReport(), 800);
</script>
</body>
</html>
